title: Entrepreneurship
description: The NYU Shanghai Program on Creativity + Innovation (PCI) and the CCD are here to support aspiring NYU Shanghai entrepreneurs at every stage of the startup journey.PCI Brochure (PDF)PCI supports students’ entrepreneurial interests at three levels: mindset, map, and method.
text:
Entrepreneurship
The NYU Shanghai Program on Creativity + Innovation (PCI) and the CCD are here to support aspiring NYU Shanghai entrepreneurs at every stage of the startup journey.
PCI Brochure (PDF)
PCI supports students’ entrepreneurial interests at three levels: mindset, map, and method.
Entrepreneurship Competitions
NYU Shanghai encourages and supports students who want to participate in entrepreneurship competitions in China and abroad. Review the list of entrepreneurship competitions below, and contact PCI for more information at creativity.innovation@nyu.edu.
Competition List
Entrepreneurship Residence Permit
International students, read the PDF below and reach out to the CCD for information about the Entrepreneurship Residence Permit.

text_blocks.text: The NYU Shanghai Program on Creativity + Innovation (PCI) and the CCD are here to support aspiring NYU Shanghai entrepreneurs at every stage of the startup journey.
PCI supports students’ entrepreneurial interests at three levels: mindset, map, and method.

NYU Shanghai encourages and supports students who want to participate in entrepreneurship competitions in China and abroad. Review the list of entrepreneurship competitions below, and contact PCI for more information at creativity.innovation@nyu.edu.
International students, read the PDF below and reach out to the CCD for information about the Entrepreneurship Residence Permit.
